title: ASR Tactical Made With Kevlar Trip Wire on Rapid Deployment Spool, 85 Feet
description:
The ASR Tactical Kevlar trip line is a high quality waxed trip line made from Kevlar cord that has a tensile strength of 85lbs. Having high flexibility and contained in a non-metallic rapid deployment spool allows greater ease of use over traditional military metal trip wire. It is difficult to cut and blends well with its surroundings. To be used in conjunction with all types of trip wire activated perimeter alarms

ASR Tactical Made With Kevlar Trip Wire on Rapid Deployment Spool, 85 Feet

The ASR Tactical Kevlar trip line is a high quality waxed trip line made from Kevlar cord that has a tensile strength of 85lbs. Having high flexibility and contained in a non-metallic rapid deployment spool allows greater ease of use over traditional military metal trip wire. It is difficult to cut and blends well with its surroundings. To be used in conjunction with all types of trip wire activated perimeter alarms.

Key Features

  • KEVLAR TRIP LINE: ASR Tactical kevlar trip wire can be used for booby traps, setting boundaries and snares, securing gear or building survival shelter; Multipurpose survival cord
  • Compatible with all outdoor perimeter alarm signaling devices that are trip wire activated
  • SPECIFICATIONS: 85 pound tensile strength; Color: Black; Length: 85 feet
  • Comes wound on a pop out rapid deployment spool that allows for quick and effortless tangle-free use
  • MADE IN THE USA

Product Specifications

  • MPN: ASRTKTL85FT
  • UPC: 855569007416
  • Color: Black

Kevlar trip wire can be used for booby traps, setting boundaries and snares, securing gear or building survival shelter; use to sew and stitch clothing in the field or use for fishing line and food procurement; multipurpose and easily carried edc gear due to the light weight and small size

Ideal for SERE and survival kits, and a wide range of other applications and uses as seen fit, including first aid kits.
